---
title: "From pixels to patterns: high-throughput in-situ imaging unveils soil fauna dynamics over a year in agroforestry systems"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Data preparation

```{r}
#Package
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ade4)
```

## Fauna data

```{r}
df_raw <- read.csv("../data/fauna_data.csv", sep = ",", na.strings = c("", "NA"))

# Data cleaning
df <- df_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(Predicted.class))%>%
  filter(!Predicted.class %in% c("under_threshold", "nodule", "SOM", "root_myccorhized", "fungi","unknown", "multi_taxa"))%>%
  mutate(
    position = substr(scanner, 4, 4),  # A, B, ou C
    depth = substr(scanner, 5, 6),      # 20 ou 50
    orientation = substr(scanner, 8, 8)     # O ou E
  )%>%
  mutate(date = ymd_hms(date), 
      date = if_else(minute(date) == 1 & !any(minute(date) == 0),  
      date - minutes(1),date), 
         hour = hour(date),minute = minute(date)) %>% 
# Some timestamps are recorded at minute = 1 instead of minute = 0.In some cases both exist, in others only minute = 1 exists. We want to correct minute = 1 to 0 only if there is no existing row at minute = 0.
  filter(date> "2024-03-01 00:00:00")%>%
  filter(minute == 0, hour %in% c(0, 6, 12, 18))
```

Selection of the most observed taxa (\> 3000 occurrences)

```{r}
filter_taxa_df <- function(df, filter_taxa = TRUE, min_occurrences = 3000) {
  
  # Recode some taxa to higher level
  df <- df %>% 
    mutate(taxa_levelup = case_when(
      Predicted.class %in% c("pseudosinella", "poduromorpha") ~ "collembola",
      Predicted.class %in% c("trombidiformes", "mesostigmata") ~ "acari",
      TRUE ~ Predicted.class
    ))
  
  if(filter_taxa) {
    # Identify taxa with enough occurrences
    relevant_taxa <- df %>% 
      group_by(Predicted.class) %>% 
      summarise(total_occurrences = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
      filter(total_occurrences >= min_occurrences) %>% 
      select(Predicted.class)

    df <- df %>% filter(Predicted.class %in% relevant_taxa$Predicted.class)
    
    cat(nrow(relevant_taxa), "selected taxa:", relevant_taxa$Predicted.class, "\n")
  }
  
  return(df)
}

df_filtered <- filter_taxa_df(df, filter_taxa = F)
```

Completion of occurrence data with 0 for non-observations of invertebrates in images and NA for missing images.

```{r}
seq_time <- seq(min(df$date), max(df$date), by = "6 hours")
#Creation of complete grid of dates 
complete_grid <- expand_grid(
  date = seq_time,
  scanner = unique(df$scanner))
#Transition from df to abundance matrix
df_complete <- df_filtered %>%
  group_by(Predicted.class, date, scanner, depth, position, orientation)%>%
  reframe(count= n())%>%
  mutate(presence = 1) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Predicted.class, values_from = count, values_fill = 0)
#Completion of the matrix
df_complete <- complete_grid %>%
  mutate(position = as.factor(substr(scanner, 4, 4)),  # A, B, ou C
    depth = as.factor(substr(scanner, 5, 6)),      # 20 ou 50
    orientation = as.factor(substr(scanner, 8, 8))     # O ou E
  )%>%
  left_join(df_complete, by = c("date", "scanner", "depth", "position", "orientation"))%>%   
  mutate(presence = replace_na(presence, 0))

#Creation of a total abundance column, but only for the most frequently observed taxa
df_complete <- df_complete %>%
  mutate(all_taxa = rowSums(select(., where(is.numeric), -presence), na.rm = FALSE)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
df_complete %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.factor(year(date)),
    month = as.factor(lubridate::month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE))) %>%
  group_by(scanner, year, month, presence) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(scanner, year, month) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = prop, fill = as.factor(presence))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  facet_grid(scanner ~ year) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "grey80", "1" = "#F4631E"),
                    labels = c("0" = "Missing data", "1" = "Current data")) +
  labs(title = "Proportion of missing data per month and per scanner",x = "month",y = "Proportion",fill = "") +theme_minimal() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),legend.position = "bottom")+theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16))
```

Selection of the aggregate variable total abundance of invertebrates per image.

### Land-use

Two types of land use are compared: under tree cover and herbaceous species, and under cultivated cover. In order to integrate this categorical variable into the structural equation model, it is recoded as a binary variable:

-   0 corresponds to surveys carried out under tree cover and herbaceous species, generally associated with position "A"

-   1 corresponds to surveys carried out under cultivated cover, generally associated with position "C"

The intermediate position "B" is removed.

```{r}
data_sem <- df_complete %>%
  filter(position != "B") %>%
  mutate(depth = as.factor(depth), 
         scanner=as.factor(scanner),
         year = as.factor(year(date)),
         month = floor_date(date, unit = "month"),
         week = floor_date(date, unit = "week")) 
```

### Missing data

We select the dates (time + day of capture) for which we have images from the eight scanners studied.

```{r}
filter_data <- function(data, min_images = 6, apply_filter = TRUE) {
  
  data <- data %>%
    group_by(date) %>%
    mutate(
      images_count = sum(presence),
      dates_to_keep = as.factor(as.integer(images_count > min_images)),
      presence = as.factor(presence)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      year = as.factor(year(date)),
      month = as.factor(month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE))
    )
  
  data_for_plot <- data
  if(apply_filter) {
    data_for_plot <- data_for_plot %>% filter(dates_to_keep == 1)
  }
  
  data_for_plot %>%
    group_by(scanner, year, month, dates_to_keep) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(scanner, year, month) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = month, y = prop, fill = dates_to_keep)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    facet_grid(~ year) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "grey80", "1" = "#00A86B"),
                      labels = c("0" = "Missing data", "1" = "Current data")) +
    labs(title = "Proportion of data retained per month and per scanner",
         x = "Month", y = "Proportion", fill = "") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16)
    )
  
    return(data)
}

data_sem <- filter_data(data_sem, min_images = 6, apply_filter = FALSE)
```

## Environmental data

```{r}
soil_probe_data <- read.csv("../data/Diams_AF1W_soil.csv") %>% 
  mutate(date = as.POSIXct(date, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), 
         depth=as.factor(depth), 
         position=as.factor(position)) %>% drop_na()

air_probe_data <- read.csv("../data/Diams_AF1W_air.csv")  %>% 
  mutate(date = as.POSIXct(date, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), 
         position=as.factor(position)) %>% drop_na()
```

Selection of humidity and temperature data

```{r}
data_sem  <- data_sem %>% 
  left_join(soil_probe_data %>% rename(hum=hum_soil, temp=temp_soil) %>% select(depth, position,date, hum, temp),by = c("date" , "depth", "position")) 
```

## Roots data

```{r}
dpi <- 1200 
pixels_per_cm <- dpi / 2.54 
root_density_raw <- read.csv("../data/root_pixels_count.csv") 
root_density<- root_density_raw %>%
  mutate(image_name = sub("\\.png$", "", root_density_raw$file)) %>%  
  separate(file, into = c("bloc", "position", "orientation","year","month", "day", "hour", "minute", "fileextension1"), 
           sep = "_|\\.|H|M.| |-", remove = FALSE)%>%
  mutate(date = ymd_hm(paste(year, month, day, hour, minute)), 
      date = if_else(minute(date) == 1 & !any(minute(date) == 0),  
      date - minutes(1),date), 
         hour = hour(date),minute = minute(date))%>%
  mutate(scanner = as.factor(paste(position, orientation, sep = "_")),
         depth = as.factor(substr(scanner, 2, 3)),
         position = as.factor(substr(scanner, 1, 1)),
         orientation = as.factor(substr(scanner, 5, 5)), 
         hour = hour(date),
         minute = minute(date)) %>%
  filter(minute == 0, hour %in% c(0, 6, 12, 18))

root_density <- root_density %>%
  arrange(depth, position, orientation, date) %>%  
  group_by(depth, position, orientation,) %>%
  mutate(lag_days = 9,
         date_target = date - days(9),
         date_target_24h = date - days(1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(root_density %>% select(depth, position, orientation, date, root_pixels_count) %>%
              rename(date_target = date,
                     root_pixels_count_lag = root_pixels_count),
            by = c("depth", "position", "orientation", "date_target")) %>%
  left_join(root_density %>% select(depth, position, orientation, date, root_pixels_count) %>%
              rename(date_target_24h = date,
                     root_pixels_count_lag_6h = root_pixels_count),
            by = c("depth", "position", "orientation", "date_target_24h")) %>%
  mutate(root_growth_pixel_count = root_pixels_count - root_pixels_count_lag,
         root_mature_pixel_count = root_pixels_count - root_growth_pixel_count,
         root_growth_pixel_count_6h = root_pixels_count - root_pixels_count_lag_6h) %>%
  mutate(root_cm2_count = root_pixels_count / (pixels_per_cm^2),
         root_growth_cm2_count = root_growth_pixel_count / (pixels_per_cm^2),
         root_mature_cm2_count = root_mature_pixel_count / (pixels_per_cm^2),
         root_growth_cm2_count_24h = (root_growth_pixel_count_6h / (pixels_per_cm^2))/24)%>%
  mutate(root_growth_cm2_count_24h = case_when(
    root_growth_cm2_count_24h < 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ root_growth_cm2_count_24h
  ))

data_sem <- data_sem %>%   
  left_join(root_density %>% select(date, position, depth, orientation, root_cm2_count, root_growth_cm2_count, root_mature_cm2_count,root_growth_cm2_count_24h), by = c("date", "position", "depth", "orientation"))
```

## Season variable

```{r}
years <- 2023:2025
season <- c("spring", "summer", "autumn", "winter")
seasons <- bind_rows(lapply(years, function(an) {
  tibble(
    season = season,
    date_debut = as.Date(paste0(an, c("-03-21", "-06-21", "-09-21", "-12-21"))),
    date_fin = as.Date(paste0(c(an, an, an, an + 1), c("-06-20", "-09-20", "-12-20", "-03-20"))))
}))

data_sem <- data_sem %>%
  mutate(day = as.Date(date))%>%
  left_join(seasons %>% rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(day = list(seq(date_debut, date_fin, by = "day"))) %>% 
  unnest(cols = c(day)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(day, season), by = "day")
```

## Data standardisation

```{r}
data_sem <- data_sem %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))))
```

## CSV generation

```{r}
data_sem$date <- format(data_sem$date, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
write.csv(data_sem, "../output/SEM_database.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = TRUE)
```
